2348720.name: The Dragons' Twilight III
2348720.description:
The world has been saved.

Twice.

The land has known peace for more than half a millennium and, well, the world still doesn’t need any more saving. There’s just no Elder Dragon attempting to raze human civilization, no possessed individual getting revenge on humanity, and no dark lords plotting world domination behind the scenes.

Yet, that doesn’t mean there are no great tales to be told! There’s more adventure, more mysteries to be solved, friends to make, and plenty of good times to be had!

Join Trace and Mila on an epic adventure, as they unravel the mysteries of Mystrift Isle; discover the reason for the sudden reappearance of dragons, and the return of lost magic to the land.

Features

  • Build a thriving town from nothing and recruit villagers 

  • Venture into the deepest depths of the ever-changing roguelite Rift for unique and powerful treasure

  • Customize your character's builds by equipping magic infused gear

  • Deep turn-based combat with over 100 abilities to find and master

  • A grand story of adventure and mystery spanning around 20 hours of gameplay

  • Four difficulties to choose from, some of which change enemy behavior in battle

  • No random battles
2348720.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
